meta.title: Hashinmy | Software, AI da aikin atomatik tare da tallafin 100%
meta.description: Hashinmy na haɓaka software na musamman, AI da aikin atomatik tare da tallafin 100% domin sabunta kamfanoni ba tare da lalata kuɗin aiki ba.
meta.ogDescription: Muna haɓaka software na musamman don sarrafa ayyukan kamfanin ku ta atomatik
meta.author: Hashinmy
meta.keywords: Hashinmy, software na musamman, AI ga kamfanoni, aikin atomatik, tallafin 100%, fasahar kamfani, Medellín, Colombia

ui.commentPlaceholder: Faɗa mana wane tsari kuke son ingantawa, wane zane, sashi ko tsarin kuke bukata, da duk wani bayani na fasaha da zai taimaka wajen shirya hanya mai bayyana.
ui.formNote: Amsoshinku za su kasance ajiye ne a cikin wannan burauzar kawai har sai kun yanke shawarar tura su.
ui.contactRequired: Ƙara imel, WhatsApp ko sunan kamfani domin Hashinmy ta tuntuɓe ka da hanyar da aka shirya.
ui.copySuccess: An kwafi taƙaitawa. Za ka iya liƙa shi a WhatsApp, imel ko CRM.
ui.copyFailure: Ba a iya kwafin taƙaitaccen bayanin ba; aika hanyar zuwa Hashinmy ta cikin fom.
ui.mailOpening: Ana buɗe imel mai ɗauke da hanyar da aka shirya; duba shi kafin aikawa zuwa Hashinmy.
ui.technicalBase: Tushen fasaha da aka ba da shawara
ui.financedSubject: Hashinmy · software na musamman · tallafin kuɗi

ui.proofTrustText: A wannan allo, abin da ake mai da hankali a kai shi ne tsaro, Zaɓi, domin hanyar ta riƙe mahallin kasuwanci da fasaha. Hashinmy yana mayar da wannan zaɓi zuwa hanya mai bayyanannen faɗi, matakan kulawa da matakai na gaba, domin kasuwanci ya iya sayarwa, aiki ko girma da ƙarancin cikas. Hashinmy kwarewa: software na musamman. AI + aikace-aikacen atomatik. manhajar hannu + software na PC. tallafin 100% / ƙiyasin kai tsaye.
ui.proofMethodText: Bincike, zane, gini, gwaji, miƙa aiki da tallafi. Medellín da Colombia ne asalinmu; isarmu ta duniya ce.
ui.proofUseCasesText: Kasuwancin kafinta, tallace-tallace, ajiyar kaya, farashin fasaha, tallafi, CRM, tashoshi, kasuwancin yanar gizo da sarrafa aiki ta atomatik.

intro.title: Fasaha ta musamman tare da tallafin 100% domin girma ba tare da lalata kuɗin aiki ba
intro.copy:
Hashinmy na juya tsarin kamfani zuwa software mai hankali, aikin atomatik da AI na musamman. Muna nazarin aiki, gano inda lokaci, kuɗi ko bayanai ke ɓacewa, sannan mu gina fasaha da za a iya tallafawa 100% domin sabuntawa ba tare da babban kuɗin farawa ba.
Mu ba kamfanin shafin yanar gizo kawai ba ne kuma ba mai samar da abu gama-gari ba ne: mu abokin fasaha ne da ke haɗa dabarun kasuwanci, injiniyan software, AI mai amfani da tallafi mai sauƙin samu.
Kamfaninka yana da ilimi, gogewa da hangen nesa. Mu muna juya su zuwa tsarin da ke tsara tallace-tallace, ƙiyasin farashi, kaya, tallafi, bayanai, matakan ciki da tashoshin dijital, tare da kare kuɗin aiki yayin da mafita ke fara kawo ƙima.
intro.optionQuestion: Wane mataki na farko ya fi dacewa da kamfaninka?
intro.insight: Za ka iya farawa da bincike, tallafi ko ƙiyasin kai tsaye; Hashinmy yana farawa daga matsala ta gaske kafin ayyana faɗin aiki, hanyar biya ko fasaha.

options.label: Binciken aiki
options.hint: Ina so Hashinmy ya gano inda lokaci, kuɗi ko bayanai ke ɓacewa
options.tech: binciken aiki + hanyar fasaha + yiwuwar tallafi
options.insight: Ina so in fara da fahimtar aikina, gano tsarin da ya fi jinkirta kasuwanci, sannan in sami hanya bayyananniya kafin in zaɓi tallafi, ƙiyasin kai tsaye ko gini a matakai.

options.label: Tallafin 100%
options.hint: Ina so in sabunta ba tare da babban kuɗin farko ba
options.insight: Ina so in ci gaba da haɓakawa tare da tallafin 100% kuma in biya a ƙananan kuɗaɗe yayin da tsarin ya fara kawo ƙima.

options.label: Ƙiyasin kai tsaye
options.hint: Ina so in san faɗin aiki da farashi ba tare da tallafi ba
options.insight: Ina so in karɓi shawara kai tsaye da faɗin aiki, farashi da lokaci a bayyane domin yanke shawara ba tare da tsarin tallafi ba.

serviceFamily.title: Zaɓi · Sabis · Ƙima
serviceFamily.copy: A wannan allo, abin da ake mai da hankali a kai shi ne Zaɓi, Sabis, Ƙima, domin hanyar ta riƙe mahallin kasuwanci da fasaha. Hashinmy yana mayar da wannan zaɓi zuwa hanya mai bayyanannen faɗi, matakan kulawa da matakai na gaba, domin kasuwanci ya iya sayarwa, aiki ko girma da ƙarancin cikas.
serviceFamily.insight: Ina zaɓar bukatar da ta fi shafar ƙwarewar aiki, gudun tallace-tallace ko ikon aiki, domin mafitar fasaha ta farko ta amsa ga matsalar kasuwanci ta gaske.

Hashinmy yana mayar da wannan zaɓi zuwa hanya mai bayyanannen faɗi, matakan kulawa da matakai na gaba, domin kasuwanci ya iya sayarwa, aiki ko girma da ƙarancin cikas.

options.insight: Hanyar da aka zaɓa: tuntuɓa, duba na mutum — taƙaitaccen aikin, tuntuɓa.

timeline.title: taswirar hanya · Gudu
timeline.copy: A wannan allo, abin da ake mai da hankali a kai shi ne taswirar hanya, Gudu, domin hanyar ta riƙe mahallin kasuwanci da fasaha. Hashinmy yana mayar da wannan zaɓi zuwa hanya mai bayyanannen faɗi, matakan kulawa da matakai na gaba, domin kasuwanci ya iya sayarwa, aiki ko girma da ƙarancin cikas.

timeline.insight: Gudun da ya dace yana juya babbar bukata zuwa isarwa masu amfani, masu auna sakamako da masu yiwuwa a tallafa ba tare da rasa hangen tsarin gaba ɗaya ba.

summary.title: taƙaitaccen aikin · taƙaitawa
summary.copy: Hanyar aikinku ta shirya. Kafin aikawa, za ka iya ƙara duk wani muhimmin bayani; ƙungiyar Hashinmy za ta duba alkiblar aikin, zaɓin tallafi da matakai na gaba cikin mahallin kasuwanci da fasaha mai bayyana.
summary.insight: Hanyar ta shirya don haɗa bukata, ilimin kamfani, faɗin fasaha, fifikon aiki, ƙimar da ake sa ran samu da tsarin biya cikin shawara mai yiwuwa.
